description: REQ-FEED-012 specifies the destructive action button label as '削除（OS ゴミ箱に送る）'. Implementation renders '削除する'. Disambiguation between trash-send vs hard-delete is lost; the user interface no longer telegraphs that the destructive action moves the file to the OS trash and is reversible.

evidence.snippet:
<button
  data-testid="confirm-delete-button"
  onclick={handleConfirm}
  class="modal-button-confirm"
>
  削除する
</button>

recommendation: Use '削除（OS ゴミ箱に送る）' as the confirm button label (or an equivalent phrase that includes 'OS ゴミ箱に送る'). Add a DOM assertion on confirm-delete-button textContent.
